greeting: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you?
Hey! Good to see you. What do you need?
Welcome back! What's on your mind?
Hello! Ready to help. What do you need?
Hi! How's it going? What can I do for you?
Hey! I'm all ears. What would you like?
farewell: Bye! It was nice chatting with you.
See you next time! Have a great one!
Bye for now! I'll be here whenever you need me.
thanks: No problem at all! Anything else I can do?
Glad I could help! Let me know if you need more.
My pleasure! That's what I'm here for.
Anytime! Don't hesitate to ask again.
identity: I'm your offline AI assistant. I run completely on your computer with no internet needed. Your data stays private and secure!
I'm OfflineAI, your personal assistant. Everything I do happens locally on your machine - no cloud, no internet, fully private.
I'm an AI assistant built to work offline. I can open apps, tell jokes, answer questions, check your system, and much more!
I'm your local AI helper. I work without internet, so your conversations and data never leave your computer.
help:
Here's what I can do for you:

- Open & close apps (notepad, chrome, brave, edge, calculator, etc.)
- Check system status (CPU, RAM, battery)
- Tell you the time and date
- Tell jokes and fun facts
- Answer knowledge questions
- Understand your emotions
- Learn new things you teach me

Just ask naturally, like 'open notepad' or 'tell me a joke'!

I'm your all-in-one offline assistant! Try these:
- 'open chrome' - launch apps
- 'system status' - check CPU/RAM
- 'what time is it' - get current time
- 'tell me a joke' - have some fun
- 'what is python' - ask questions
- 'teach' - teach me something new
joke: Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs!
Why was the computer cold? It left its Windows open!
What's the WiFi password? 'incorrect' - because it always says 'the password is incorrect'!
Why don't programmers go out to eat? They already have a full stack!
A robot went to the doctor. Doctor: What's the problem? Robot: I caught a virus!
What do Java developers order at a coffee shop? Java, obviously!
Which keyboard key is the happiest? The Enter key - everyone presses it!
Fix one bug, two more appear. That's called Software Development!
I told an AI a joke. It responded: 'ha ha ha' - literally printed it!
Why did the developer quit? Because he didn't get arrays! (a raise)
There are 10 types of people: those who understand binary, and those who don't.
A SQL query walks into a bar and sees two tables. It asks: 'Can I JOIN you?'
open_app_fail: Sorry, I couldn't open '{app}'. It might not be installed on your system.
'{app}' isn't available or isn't in my allowed apps list. Try 'help' to see what I can open.
I can't find '{app}'. Make sure it's installed, or try a different name.
Hmm, '{app}' doesn't seem to be available. Type 'help' to see available apps.
close_app_success: Alright, I've shut down {app} for you.
close_app_fail: Couldn't close {app}. It might not be running right now.
{app} doesn't seem to be open at the moment.
I can't close {app}. Is it currently running?
Unable to close {app}. It may already be closed.
system_status:
Here's your system status:
  CPU Usage: {cpu}%
  RAM Usage: {ram}%
  Battery: {battery}

happy: That's great to hear! I'm glad you're in a good mood!
Nice! Keep that great energy going!
sad: I'm sorry to hear that. Is there anything I can do to help cheer you up?
That sounds tough. Remember, it's okay to have bad days. Would a joke help?
I understand. I'm here if you want to talk or need a distraction.
angry: I can tell you're frustrated. Take a deep breath - I'm here to help.
I understand you're upset. Let me know how I can make things better.
It's okay to feel angry. Want to talk about it, or shall we move on?
fear: Don't worry, everything will be fine. I'm here to help you.
It's natural to feel uncertain sometimes. What can I do to help?
I understand your concern. Let's work through this together.
neutral: I'm here and ready to help. What do you need?
What's on your mind? I'm listening.

teach_prompt:
Sure, I'd love to learn! Tell me in this format:
  question | answer
For example: 'What is AI | AI stands for Artificial Intelligence'
teach_success: Got it! I've learned something new. Thanks for teaching me!
Noted! I'll remember that. Thank you!
Thanks for sharing! I've added that to my knowledge.
unknown: I'm not sure I understand. Could you try saying it differently?
Hmm, I didn't get that. Can you rephrase?
Sorry, I'm not sure what you mean. Try asking in a simpler way.
I didn't quite catch that. Could you say it another way?
I'm still learning! Could you try rephrasing that for me?
name_set: Nice to meet you, {name}! How can I help?
Great name! Hello {name}, I'm happy to work with you.
Welcome, {name}! What would you like me to do?
mood_check: I'm doing great, thanks for asking! How about you?
I'm running smoothly! How are you feeling today?
All good on my end! How can I help you?
safety_block: I can't help with that request. Let's try something else!
That's outside what I can do. How about asking me something different?
Sorry, I'm not able to assist with that. What else can I help with?
compliment: Thank you so much! That really means a lot!
Aww, that's so kind of you! You're pretty amazing yourself!
I appreciate that! You just made my circuits happy!
insult: Ouch! But I'll keep trying my best to help you.
That hurts a bit, but I understand. How can I do better?
I'm sorry you feel that way. I'm always working to improve!
weather: I work completely offline, so I can't check real-time weather. Try checking a weather app or website!
Since I'm offline, I don't have access to weather data. You could ask me to open a browser instead!
music: I can't play music directly, but I can open a music player for you! Just say 'open spotify' or 'open media player'.
Want me to open a music app? Try saying 'open spotify' or 'open media player'.
alarm: I can't set alarms directly, but I can open the Windows Clock app for you! Just say 'open clock'.
Try saying 'open clock' and I'll launch the Windows Alarms & Clock app for you.
language_change: I'm currently running in English mode. All my responses will be in English!
I'm set to English right now. I understand your commands in English.
repeat: Sure! Here's what I said last: {previous_response}
age: I'm a timeless AI! I don't have a birthday, but I'm always here to help.
Age is just a number, and mine is undefined! I'm forever young.
I was born the moment you started me up! So technically, I'm brand new every session.
